name: Strawberry Applesauce Gelatin
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Package of strawberry flavor gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the sugar-free gelatin in boiling water.
2. Refrigerate until lukewarm, then add the applesauce.
3. Pour into individual dishes and refrigerate until firm.
Serving Suggestion: Serve as a dessert or use instead of jam with a bran muffin.
